utils_class.name: Utils
utils_class.description: Utility functions for executing and managing REST API requests
utils_class.critical_note: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Utils class does NOT have GetDataTable() or PopulateTable() methods. Those methods belong to RESTAPIRequest class. Utils only provides helper functions to get, execute, and configure requests.

methods_that_do_NOT_exist_in_Utils: GetDataTable - This is a method of RESTAPIRequest, NOT Utils
PopulateTable - This is a method of RESTAPIRequest, NOT Utils

correct_usage_pattern.step2: Dim request As RESTAPIRequest = utils.GetSavedRequest(si, requestName)
correct_usage_pattern.step3: Dim dt As DataTable = request.GetDataTable() ' Call on request, NOT utils
correct_usage_pattern.step4: request.PopulateTable(si) ' Call on request, NOT utils

functions.name: ExecuteRequest
functions.signature: Public Function ExecuteRequest(method As String, endpoint As String, urlParams As Dictionary(Of String, String), headers As Dictionary(Of String, String), bodyType As String, body As Object, variables As Dictionary(Of String, String), Optional authCredentials As AuthCredentials = Nothing, Optional modifiedUrlParams As Dictionary(Of String, String) = Nothing) As HttpResult
functions.description: Executes an HTTP request with full configuration

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: HTTP method: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH

parameters.name: bodyType
parameters.description: Body MIME type: application/json, application/x-www-form-urlencoded, text/plain, multipart/form-data, none

functions.name: ExecuteSavedRequest
functions.signature: Public Function ExecuteSavedRequest(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String) As HttpResult
functions.description: Executes a saved request by name
functions.example:
Dim result As HttpResult = New Utils().ExecuteSavedRequest(si, "GetCustomers")
If result.StatusCode = HttpStatusCode.OK Then
    BRApi.ErrorLog.LogMessage(si, result.Content)
End If

functions.name: GetSavedRequest
functions.signature: Public Function GetSavedRequest(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String) As RESTAPIRequest
functions.description: Retrieves a saved request configuration by name
functions.example:
Dim request As RESTAPIRequest = New Utils().GetSavedRequest(si, "GetProducts")
' Modify request if needed
request.variables("category") = "electronics"
' Execute
Dim result As HttpResult = request.Execute()

functions.name: GetSavedRequestInfo
functions.signature: Public Function GetSavedRequestInfo(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String) As Dictionary(Of String, String)
functions.description: Gets basic info about a saved request (name, method, endpoint, bodyType, etc.)

functions.name: GetSavedRequestParams
functions.signature: Public Function GetSavedRequestParams(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String) As Dictionary(Of String, String)
functions.description: Gets URL parameters of a saved request

functions.name: GetSavedRequestHeaders
functions.signature: Public Function GetSavedRequestHeaders(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String) As Dictionary(Of String, String)
functions.description: Gets headers of a saved request

functions.name: GetSavedRequestVariables
functions.signature: Public Function GetSavedRequestVariables(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String) As Dictionary(Of String, String)
functions.description: Gets variables of a saved request

functions.name: GetSavedRequestBody
functions.signature: Public Function GetSavedRequestBody(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String, bodyType As String) As Object
functions.description: Gets body content of a saved request

functions.name: GetSavedRequestAuthCredentials
functions.signature: Public Function GetSavedRequestAuthCredentials(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String) As AuthCredentials
functions.description: Gets authentication credentials of a saved request

functions.name: GetSavedRequestColumnMappings
functions.signature: Public Function GetSavedRequestColumnMappings(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String) As Dictionary(Of String, String)
functions.description: Gets column mappings configuration of a saved request

functions.name: ReplaceVariables
functions.signature: Public Function ReplaceVariables(text As String, variables As Dictionary(Of String, String), escape As Boolean) As String
functions.description: Replaces {{key}} patterns in text with values from variables dictionary
functions.example:
Dim text As String = "https://api.com/{{path}}/{{id}}"
Dim vars As New Dictionary(Of String, String) From {{"path", "users"}, {"id", "123"}}
Dim url As String = New Utils().ReplaceVariables(text, vars, True)
' Result: https://api.com/users/123

functions.name: MergeDictionaries
functions.signature: Public Function MergeDictionaries(dict1 As Dictionary(Of String, String), dict2 As Dictionary(Of String, String)) As Dictionary(Of String, String)
functions.description: Merges two dictionaries, with dict2 values overriding dict1

functions.name: ProcessDictionaryWithVariables
functions.signature: Public Function ProcessDictionaryWithVariables(original As Dictionary(Of String, String), variables As Dictionary(Of String, String), escape As Boolean) As Dictionary(Of String, String)
functions.description: Processes all values in a dictionary through variable replacement

functions.name: ProcessBodyVariables
functions.signature: Public Function ProcessBodyVariables(body As Object, variables As Dictionary(Of String, String)) As Object
functions.description: Processes request body through variable replacement (handles String, Dictionary, IEnumerable)
